Anouk Mirelez is the founder of Junipergrid Labs. Anouk pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Junipergrid Labs
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Anouk Mirelez.

Junipergrid Labs is a seed-stage company. Founded by Anouk Mirelez. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Junipergrid Labs call with Anouk Mirelez.
Anouk is worried the Junipergrid Labs pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
I committed to sending Anouk the diligence checklist by Friday.
Anouk prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
